purpose: KAP is the acquisition, preservation, normalization, distillation, and memory-instillation layer of yOS.
core_invariants: Every output must pass persistence gate
Deltas must compare against prior state
Mem0 is active distilled memory, not raw corpus
Notion is hub/navigation/archive, not sole source of truth
UI/manual fallbacks are valid but must be documented

system_layers.role: Fetching raw data from sources via API or UI fallback.
Storing raw data immutably in Git with provenance.
Converting raw, heterogeneous data into standard yOS schemas.
Extracting high-value concepts, decisions, and context.
Pushing distilled knowledge to queryable vector/relational stores.
Merging validated knowledge into the Elysium Civilizational Ontology.
Autonomous scheduling of the entire pipeline for future deltas.
